full.title: Full Tournament
full.description: Predict every match from group stage to the final.

groups.title: Groups Only
groups.description: Pick group-stage winners and see how you rank.

playoff.title: Playoff Only
playoff.description: Focus on the knockout rounds — big points, big pressure.

fun.title: Fun Picks
fun.description: Wild-card questions and bonus predictions for extra points.

SignIn.title: Sign in
SignIn.subtitle: No passwords — a magic link or your Google account.
SignIn.sentBody: We sent you a sign-in link. Open it in this browser to continue.
SignIn.hint: First time here? Signing in creates your account.

errors.invalidEmail: That doesn't look like a valid email address.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts — wait a minute and try again.

SignIn.bannedBody: Your account has been banned by the administrator. Your predictions are retained but you can no longer participate.

Onboarding.title: Almost there
Onboarding.subtitle: Set up your player profile.
Onboarding.nameHint: 3–20 characters. Visible on leaderboards. Must be unique.
Onboarding.hardcoreBody: When joining a challenge you can flip on hardcore: you predict exact scores instead of just outcomes and compete on a separate bonus leaderboard too. You can toggle it per challenge until that challenge locks.

errors.invalidName: Name must be 3–20 characters: letters, digits, spaces, _ . -
errors.nameTaken: That name is already taken (names are case-insensitive).
errors.generic: Could not save your profile. Please try again.

ChallengesHome.title: Challenges
ChallengesHome.playoffHint: Opens when the group stage finishes; picks lock at the first R32 kickoff:
ChallengesHome.lockedHint: This challenge is locked — predictions are frozen.
ChallengesHome.playoffJoinHint: Come back once the group stage is done.
ChallengesHome.submitGateHint: Your entry joins the leaderboard only after you submit.
ChallengesHome.submitWarning: {count, plural, =1 {1 pick still missing — it'll score 0} other {# picks still missing — they'll score 0}}. You can submit now and keep editing until the deadline.
ChallengesHome.groupLocked: ({count, plural, =1 {1 locked before you joined} other {# locked before you joined}})

copy.confirm: Prefill this challenge with your Full Tournament predictions? It overwrites your current picks here for matches that haven't kicked off — you can still edit afterwards.
copy.done: Prefilled {count, plural, =1 {1 prediction} other {# predictions}} from your Full Tournament.
copy.skippedLocked: {count, plural, =1 {1 already kicked off} other {# already kicked off}}.
copy.skippedNeedsScore: {count, plural, =1 {1 needs an exact score} other {# need exact scores}} — add by hand.
copy.skippedMismatch: {count, plural, =1 {1 left empty (your bracket differs from the real one)} other {# left empty (your bracket differs from the real one)}}.

error.invalid: Couldn't copy — try reloading the page.
error.locked: This challenge is locked — copying is closed.
error.error: Something went wrong copying. Please try again.

Predict.lockedBanner: Predictions are locked — this is a read-only view of your picks.
Predict.saveError: Couldn't save — tap your pick again to retry.

thirds.title: Third-place ranking
thirds.subtitle: Your 12 predicted third-placed teams, ranked by points, goal difference and goals scored — the best 8 reach the Round of 32.
thirds.groupsDone: Group predictions complete — that's everything for this challenge. 🏁
thirds.incomplete: Predict all 12 groups to resolve the third-place ranking.
thirds.missing: {count, plural, =1 {1 group is} other {# groups are}} still incomplete

bracket.pickHint: Pick who you think goes through — extra time and penalties included.
bracket.scoreHint: Predict the score after 90 minutes (regulation time). If it's a draw, also pick who goes through on extra time / penalties.
bracket.staleCleared: {count, plural, =1 {1 downstream pick was} other {# downstream picks were}} cleared — that team no longer reaches there.
bracket.staleOnLoad: {count, plural, =1 {1 saved pick no longer matches} other {# saved picks no longer match}} your current group tables — re-pick the highlighted matches.
bracket.picksLeft: {count, plural, =1 {1 pick left} other {# picks left}}
bracket.needsGroups: Your Round of 32 derives from your predicted group tables — finish all 12 groups first.

Fun.title: Fun Picks
Fun.lockedBanner: The Fun challenge is locked — answers are final.

questions.host_reaches_qf: Will a host nation reach the quarter-finals?
questions.highest_scoring_match: Most goals in a single match

hints.fastest_goal_minute: Match minute of the earliest goal in any game (1–90+).
hints.highest_scoring_match: Total goals in the tournament's highest-scoring single match.
hints.host_reaches_qf: USA, Mexico or Canada reaching the quarter-finals.

Playoff.title: Playoff Only
Playoff.subtitle: The real bracket — the 32 teams that actually qualified. Pick your way to the champion.
Playoff.lockedBanner: The Playoff challenge is locked — picks are final.
Playoff.bracketPending: The real Round of 32 pairings are still being confirmed. Check back in a few minutes.

Redistribution.title: Knockout redistribution
Redistribution.explainer: The group stage is over and the real bracket is set. You can re-pick your knockout bracket using the 32 teams that actually qualified — at a cost: all knockout points from the redistributed stage onward are multiplied down. Points already earned keep full value.
Redistribution.confirmBody: Your knockout picks from {round} onward will be replaced by a fresh bracket over the real teams. In exchange you'll earn only {percent}% of all further knockout points. Earlier rounds keep their full value. This cannot be undone.
Redistribution.rejected: Redistribution was rejected by the server — the stage may have already started, or you've already redistributed at this stage.
Redistribution.lockedRoundsHint: Earlier rounds are fixed to the real results — you can't re-predict the past.

Tournament.title: Tournament
Tournament.groupsHint: Top 2 of each group qualify (solid line); the 8 best third-placed teams join them (dashed line).
Tournament.noScorers: Scorer stats appear after the first goals are synced.
Tournament.bracketAfterGroups: The real bracket appears once the group stage wraps up and the Round of 32 pairings are set (June 27).

Leaderboards.title: Leaderboards
Leaderboards.hardcoreHint: Hardcore board: exact-score bonus points only, hardcore entries only.
Leaderboards.empty: Nobody on this board yet — points appear once predicted matches finish.

Profile.title: Profile
Profile.visitorNote: Predictions are visible only for matches that already kicked off — no spying on open picks.
Profile.redistributed: Bracket redistributed before {stage} — knockout points from there on count at {percent}%.
Profile.noLockedPredsOwn: None of your predicted matches has kicked off yet.
Profile.noLockedPreds: No predictions visible yet — they unlock as matches kick off.

Rules.title: Rules & scoring
Rules.intro: One scoring table for everyone; hardcore players earn extra bonus points on a separate board. Points are recomputed from official results after every sync.

deadlines.title: Deadlines
deadlines.main: Full Tournament, Groups Only and Fun Picks lock at the kickoff of the last first-round group match:
deadlines.playoff: Playoff Only opens when the group stage finishes and locks at the first Round-of-32 kickoff:
deadlines.kickedOff: Any match that has already kicked off is locked for everyone — late joiners simply score 0 on it.
deadlines.serverSide: All locks are enforced server-side. Nobody can see your unlocked predictions, and nobody can edit locked ones.

hardcore.title: Hardcore mode
hardcore.body: Hardcore players predict exact scores. Match outcomes are derived from those scorelines for the global leaderboard, and exact-score bonuses count on the separate hardcore leaderboard. You choose hardcore per challenge when joining and can toggle it until that challenge locks.

group.title: Group stage
group.exactOrder: Exact final group order (all 4 places, per group)

knockout.title: Knockout
knockout.note: Per real team you predicted to reach that round. A team that fell short scores 0 — that's what redistribution is for.
knockout.r16: Predicted team reaches the Round of 16
knockout.aetFlag: Correct "extra time / penalties" flag on a correctly picked match

hardcoreTable.title: Hardcore bonuses
hardcoreTable.note: Counted on the hardcore leaderboard only.
hardcoreTable.exactScore: Exact score (group match or knockout 90 minutes)
hardcoreTable.goalDiff: Correct goal difference in a non-draw
hardcoreTable.advancePick: Correct advance pick after a predicted knockout draw

fun.title: Fun Picks
fun.body: Twelve one-off questions, locked with the main deadline. Numeric questions score by closeness to the real value.

redistribution.title: Knockout redistribution
redistribution.body: After the group stage, Full Tournament players may re-pick their knockout bracket using the real qualified teams — at a price: every knockout point from that stage onward is multiplied down.
redistribution.note: One redistribution per stage at most; the multiplier never goes back up. Points earned before redistributing keep full value.

matches.hint: Saving a correction flags the match as manually corrected — sync will not overwrite it until you clear the flag. Points and standings recompute immediately.
matches.explainer: 90' scores drive scoring. For knockout matches pick who advances; ET/pens fields are informational (they mark the match as decided beyond 90 minutes).

challenges.hint: Override wins over the timestamps. Matches that already kicked off stay locked even under "force open".

users.hint: Ban hides the user from leaderboards and blocks all writes; predictions are retained. Entries can be deleted individually.
users.deleteEntryConfirm: Delete this user's {kind} entry with all its predictions?

fun.hint: Enter the real answers after the tournament (numeric ones can be set earlier — scoring recomputes on every save). For player picks use the suggestions: scoring matches the exact spelling.
